snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Official Hindi Trailer | Ranveer S | Aditya D | In Cinemas 19 March 2026
snippet.description:
Ab Pakistan ka mustakbil, Hindustan tay karega
Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Releasing worldwide on 19 March, on Gudi Padwa, Ugadi, and Eid.

Jio Studios presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE 

Written, Directed and Produced by Aditya Dhar
Produced by Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by Lokesh Dhar

Trailer Scored, Composed and Produced by Shashwat Sachdev

Ari Ari Song Credits: 
Composed, Arranged and Programmed by Shashwat Sachdev
Vocals: Navtej Singh Rehal (Bombay Rockers), Khan Saab, Jasmine Sandlas & Sudhir Yaduvanshi
Rap Performed and written by Reble, Token 
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil, Bombay Rockers
Score Producer Adam Lucas
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Director of Photography - Vikash Nowlakha
Editor: Shivkumar V. Panicker
Music and Background Score: Shashwat Sachdev
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Executive Producer: Rahul H. Gandhi
Character & Prosthetics Designer: Preetisheel Singh D’Souza
Sound Designer: Bishwadeep Chatterjee
Costume Designer: Smriti Chauhan
Action Directors: Aejaz Gulab, Sea Young Oh, Yannick Ben, Ramazan Bulut
Choreographer: Vijay Ganguly
Additional Screenplay: Shivkumar V. Panicker, Ojas Gautam
Additional Production Designer: Rupin Suchak
Associate Director & Second Unit Director: Rohun Rege
Chief Assistant Director: Sameer Sadhwani
Director’s Assistant: Ojas Gautam
Creative Producer: Aarsh Vora
Assistant Producer: Shweta Vora
Line Producer: Naseer Ahmed Khan
Research Consultant: Aditya Raj Kaul, Dibya S.
Associate Editor: Sumit Dhole, Juhi Gopalakrishnan
Marketing Manager: Chelsea Gupta
Production Sound Mixers: Manas Bal, Prabal Pradhan
Post Producer: Gautmik
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (CAS)
VFX Supervisor: Dhruti Ranjan Sahoo
VFX Studios: Envision VFX, Philm CGI, Redefine, R2 VFX
DI Studio: Redefine
DI Colourist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
PR Agency: Communique Film PR
Marketing Agency: MAX Marketing Ltd
Teaser and Trailer Editor: Ojas Gautam
Dubbing & Localization: Annapurna Studios
Visual Promotion: Jayesh Shikarkhane & Team
Publicity Design: Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)

Jio Studios Team
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production and Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.title: Ustaad Bhagat Singh Trailer Tease | Pawan Kalyan | Harish Shankar | Sreeleela | Raashii Khanna
snippet.description:
Ustaad Bhagat Singh Trailer Tease on @MythriMovieMakers 

Ustaad Bhagat Singh is an Upcoming Telugu movie ft. Pawan Kalyan, Sreeleela, Raashii Khanna & others. Music composed by Rockstar Devi Sri Prasad, Written and Directed by Harish Shankar.S. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers Banner.

In Cinemas March 19th, 2026.

Witness PSPK at his entertaining best in Ustaad Bhagat Singh.

Hit ‘I’m Interested’ now for exclusive offers, updates & more only on BookMyShow.
Link: https://bookmy.show/UBS-HI 

#UstaadBhagatSinghTrailerTease #UstaadBhagatSingh #PawanKalyan #HarishShankar #Sreeleela #RaashiiKhanna #DeviSriPrasad #DSP #NaveenYerneni #RaviShankar #MythriMovieMakers

हो कैसे आऊ मिलवे बजेंगे कंगना 
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

हा आवे तो आजा झूठी बात क्यों बनावे,,
दो महीना से रानी येठ क्यों दिखावे 

हा बात बनावे बैठी बैठी अंगना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जावे संजना,,

हा करले सवर बाबू मिलने भी आऊंगी,,
प्यार की है प्यास पानी हाथ से पिलाऊंगी,,

प्यार से बडो कोई रोग हतना,,
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

न चहिए प्यार मोकू बारिश की बूंद को,,
छाती से लगाके देजा मौकु सकून सो,,

हा खून सो जलावे गोरी तेरा हंसना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जाएंगे सजना,,

Ho kese aau milve bajenge kangna,,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna 

Aave to aaja jhuti baat Kyo banave,,
Do mahina se rani yeth kyo dikhave,,
Ha baat banave bethi bethi angana,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna

Ha karle savar babu milne bhi aaungi ,,
Pyar ki hai pyas pani hath se pilaungi,,,
Pyar se bdo koi rog hath na,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna,,

N chahiye pyar moku barish ki bund ko,,
Chhati se lagake deja moku sakun so,,

khoon  so jalave gori tera hasna,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna,,,

snippet.title: Nagan Si Lugai Tera Balam Chota (Official Video) Farmani Naaz | New haryanvi Song | Hema| Naaz
snippet.description:
#terabalamchota  #NaganSiLugai #Naazmusic
#NaganSiLugai #farmaninaaz i #terabalamchota #Naazmusic 

Song  - Nagan Si Lugai | नागन सी लुगाई 
Artist   -  Hema Chaudhary.Rahul Mulheda , Varunesh Baisla
Lyrics  - Anuj Mulheda 
Music - Gaurav Panchal (Gr Music -8708626865)
Singer - Farmani Naaz , Manish Tyagi 
Video Shoot - Panchal Productions
Director -  Rahul Mulheda , Nitin Panchal 
Editor - Nitin Panchal 
Publicity Design - Rahul mulheda
Publisher - Naaz Music
Label -   Naaz Music
Production - Rahul Mulheda
Special Thanks - Naaz Music And Team
For any query:- Email - farmaninaaz786@gmail.com

                 Lyrics
Mhare khat khatoli ka na tota
ra mahre khat khatoli ka na tota

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Lakh lakh ke shut ma phru
Sava lakh ki jutti re

Chandi ka mera vir al nada
Delhi ke ma kotti re

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Up ke ma dunga maru halle delhi sari ri
Dur dur ta nigah gadave rande cheel juhari ri

Love you bhabhi

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

do balka ki ma bngi ma lagu kati kavari si 
Dhunge mere jholl marre

Chotti nag bnari ri
Bin hi bja du kya

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri


म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा
र म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा 

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

लाख लाख के सूट मै पहरू सवा लाख की जूती रे
चांदी का मेरा वायरल नाड़ा दिल्ली के मै कोठी र

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

यूपी के मै ढुंगा मारू हाले दिल्ली सारी री
दूर दूर त निगाह गड़ावे रांडे छेल जुहारी री
लव यू भाभी

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

दो बालका की मां बनगी मै लागू कती कवारी सी
ढुंगे मेरे झोल मार र चोटी नाग बनारी री
बीन ही बजा दू क्या

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री

Nagan Si Lugai | नागन सी लुगाई | Official Video Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2024. Nanhe Nanhe Ghungroo Haryanvi Song Starring with farmani naaz hema chaudhary  
This Haryanvi Song Sung by rahul mulheda. Music given manish tyagi. Penned by Ravi Rangi. Copyright & Music label by NAAZ MUSIC

snippet.title: DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE Trailer Reaction! | Ranveer Singh | Arjun Rampal | Sanjay Dutt | Aditya Dhar
snippet.description:
Jaby and Achara react to the explosive trailer of the upcoming spy-action sequel Dhurandhar: The Revenge, a high-stakes continuation of the blockbuster franchise directed by Aditya Dhar. The trailer teases an intense revenge-driven story filled with brutal action, political intrigue, and powerful confrontations as the conflict escalates across borders. ⚔️🔥

The film features a powerhouse cast led by Ranveer Singh (Padmaavat, Gully Boy, Bajirao Mastani), alongside Sanjay Dutt (KGF: Chapter 2, Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.), R. Madhavan (Rocketry: The Nambi Effect, 3 Idiots), Arjun Rampal (Ra.One, Om Shanti Om), Akshaye Khanna (Drishyam 2, Border), and Sara Arjun (Deiva Thirumagal, Saivam), all bringing intensity and depth to this gritty espionage thriller. The trailer promises larger-than-life action, emotional stakes, and a story fueled by revenge and patriotism.

snippet.title: KISAAN BAHURIYA OFFICIAL TRAILER I किसान बहुरिया I ANJANA SINGH I PRASHANT SINGH I BHOJPURI MOVIE
snippet.description:
#anjanasingh #prashantsingh #khushijha #golutiwari #kisaanbahuriya #manjulthakur #omjha #trailer #bhojpurimovie #bhojpurisuperhitmovie 


IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH SHREE AADYA ENTERTAINMENT

      
फ़िल्म –  किसान बहुरिया (भोजपुरी फिल्म )
कलाकार – अंजना  सिंह  , प्रशांत  सिंह  , ख़ुशी झा  , विद्या  सिंह  , गोलू  तिवारी  , अशोक  मिश्रा  , सुधा  यादव  
बाल कलाकार - दीक्षा मिश्रा
निर्देशक – मंजुल ठाकुर
कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह
लेखक   - अरबिंद तिवारी  
संगीतकार- ओम झा
गीतकार - अरबिंद तिवारी , प्यारे लाल यादव 
छायांकन -  इमरान शगुन
संकलन - समीर शैख़ व जाहिद खान
कोरियोग्राफर – एम .के .गुप्ता (जॉय )
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन - दास स्टूडियो
प्रोडक्शन  कंट्रोलर  – रोशन  रॉय  , सोनू  मिश्रा 
लोकल  प्रोडक्शन  –  मुकेश  दुबे  ,कमलेश  सिंह, दुष्यंत   सिंह   
आर्ट डायरेक्टर – नज़ीर शेख
निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, मंजुल ठाकुर
 म्यूजिक – IVY MUSIC 
सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी
B4U क्रिएटिव टीम – 
मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय, विशाल यादव

B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे
ऑफिस बॉय – कन्हैया झा 

IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट - फाइनेंस  -
 प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल , गणेश महादेव टापरे , हिमांशु चौधरी 

B4U - फाइनेंस-
 संतोष गर्ग , रविंदर साल्वी , साक्षी शैलार

FILM- KISAAN BAHURIYA (Bhojpuri film)
STARCAST- Anjana singh , Prashant singh , Khushijha , Vidhya singh , Golu tiwari , Ashok Mishra , Sudha Yadav , 
CHILD ARTIST – DIKSHA MISHRA 
DIRECTOR- MANJUL THAKUR 
CONCEPT – SANDEEP SINGH
WRITER - ARBIND TIWARI 
MUSIC DIRECTOR- OM JHA 
LYRICS – ARBIND TIWARI, PYARE LAL YADAV
EDITOR- SAMEER SHAIKH, ZAHEED KHAN
CINEMATOGRAPHER- IMRAN SHAGUN 
CHOREOGRAPHER- M.K GUPTA (JOY)
ART DIRECTOR- NAZEER SHAIKH 
POST PRODUCTION – DAS STUDIO
PRODUCTION CONTROLLER – ROSHAN ROY , SONU MISHRA
LOCAL PRODUCTION – MUKESH DUBEY, KAMLESH SINGH, DUSHYANT SINGH  
PRODUCER- SANDEEP SINGH, MANJUL THAKUR
Music, satellite and digital partner- B4U BHOJPURI

B4U CREATIVE TEAM 
MARUDA SHARMA ( E.P ), NEHA UPADHYAY, VISHAL YADAV 

B4U - LEGAL TEAM 
SANDEEP RANA , TRUSHNA PATEL , POONAM SHINDE , AKANKSHA WAKODE, MORE
OFFICE BOY - KANHAIYA JHA

IVY ENETERTAINMENT- FINANCE
PRADEEP K DAGA , JINELLE MASCARENHAS , VIPUL JAIN , NIVRUTTI PATIL , GANESH MAHADEV TAPRE , HIMANSHU CHAUDHARY


B4U – FINANCE TEAM
 SANTOSH GARG , RAVINDER SALVI, SAKSHI SHELAR 

         


Subscribe us - https://www.youtube.com/@b4ubhojpuri-
Follow us on Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/B4UBhojpuri/
Follow us on Instagram - https://www.facebook.com/B4UBhojpuri/

video credit 

ritika queen 
sharad shivhare 
Shoot with editing -patel


LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

Subscribe to the channel and click the bell icon to be notified of all the latest TV & streaming series: http://bit.ly/2qTF6ZY

► Download the app: https://bit.ly/4lcQqHs
 
US Air Date: April 19, 2026
Starring: Harold Perrineau, Catalina Sandino Moreno, Hannah Cheramy
Network: MGM+
Synopsis: In Season Four, the closer the residents of town get to the answers they seek, the more terrifying their search becomes. Who is the Man in Yellow, and what does he want? Will Jade and Tabitha’s revelation be the key to finally going home? How much longer can Boyd hold the town together, even as his body and mind are falling apart? And what role will the town’s most recent arrival play in the events to come? Season Four will open doors that some in town will end up wishing had remained closed.

snippet.title: Why Dhurandhar: The Revenge Could Be India’s BIGGEST EVER Movie
snippet.description:
In this video, we talk about the details seen in the Dhurandhar: The Revenge trailer. The trailer does not reveal much of the story, but some scenes give hints about the plot and how the story might move forward. We discuss how the film appears to focus on Pakistan’s proxy war tactics and how the narrative may develop around that theme. The trailer also seems to show parts of Ranveer Singh’s character’s early life before his mission connected to Pakistan. We also cover the strong reactions and discussions that started after the trailer was released, showing how much hype the movie has created. Reports suggest that another film, Toxic, postponed its release around the same time. We also discuss how newer directors like Aditya Dhar are bringing a different style and approach to Bollywood storytelling.

Lyrics -

M अगे शहर में कि हौ खबरवा गे हमरा बारे में,
सुने में आवो हौ हलचल हकै पूरा बिहारे में।
F अरे तोरे चर्चा चलो हौ सगरो कैनी हे जे कतल के,
F वीडियो वाइरल होल हौ रे छौड़ा तोर कल के,
गोली चलेनी हे जे सनरूप से निकल के।

अंतरा 1
F अरे हलौ जे भी साथे ओकरा हो गेलौ गिरफ़्तारी रे,
कब तक रहमी छुपके छौड़ा तोर हौ अब बारी रे।
M अगे चाहे केतनो हमरा पर लगा देतै इनाम गे,
 पूलिस से धरा जिबै एतना हकै न आसान गे।
F अरे जहिया हाथ में ऐमी छौड़ा रख देतौ मसल के,
F वीडियो वाइरल होल हौ रे छौड़ा तोर कल के,
गोली चलेनी हे जे सनरूप से निकल के।

अंतरा 2
F अरे पूरा सोशल मीडिया के कैले हखी हैंग रे,
आज ले देखलियौ न तोरा जैसन गैंग रे।
M अगे हकै मोर बिधैकवे के बेटा से यारी गे,
हल्के में न लिहो हम हियौ रायफलधारी गे।
F राजा रौशन रोहिया कुछ दिन रहिहो संभल के,
F वीडियो वाइरल होल हौ रे छौड़ा तोर कल के,
गोली चलेनी हे जे सनरूप से निकल के।

snippet.title: TATEEREE | Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boli He Tatiri | New Haryanvi Song 2026 | Badshah | Haryanvi Song
snippet.description:
TATEEREE | Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boli He Tatiri | New Haryanvi Song 2026 | Badshah | Haryanvi Song
TATEEREE | Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri | New Haryanvi Song 2026 | Latest Haryanvi Song

#tateereesong #tatirisong #tateeree #badshah #badshahsong #badshahnewsong #haryanvi #haryanvisong #haryanvisongsharyanavi #haryanvisongs #haryanvigane #hrsong #newharyanvisong #newharyanvisongsharyanavi2025 #haryanvidjsong #haryanviculture  

A fresh and energetic New Haryanvi Song 2026 – “TATEEREE (Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri)”, presented by Haryanvi Star Records, bringing the vibrant flavor of Haryana’s folk rhythm and modern music together.

This song captures the playful romance and desi swag of Haryanvi culture. The catchy line “Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri” adds a fun and addictive vibe that makes everyone want to dance and enjoy the rhythm.

With powerful vocals, lively beats, and colorful visuals, TATEEREE is a perfect mix of traditional Haryanvi style and modern music production that will make you listen to it again and again.

If you love Haryanvi songs, desi swag, and energetic beats, this track is made for you.

🔥 Turn up the volume and enjoy the vibe of TATEEREE.

For Business Enquires and any other Enquires
Contact- 8959171538

Audio Credits 
►Album: Payal Ki Khanak Se Jagege Sajna
►Song:  Payal Ki Khanak Se Jagege Sajna
►Singer: Anil Rawat & Kajal Hathrasi 
►Lyrics: Anil Rawat,Rambal Rawat 
►Music: JPS Music - 

Video credit- 
Prince Yadav
Kalpana raj
rawsahab singh bundela
rahul yadav

ramraja

हो कैसे आऊ मिलवे बजेंगे कंगना 
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

हा आवे तो आजा झूठी बात क्यों बनावे,,
दो महीना से रानी येठ क्यों दिखावे 

हा बात बनावे बैठी बैठी अंगना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जावे संजना,,

हा करले सवर बाबू मिलने भी आऊंगी,,
प्यार की है प्यास पानी हाथ से पिलाऊंगी,,

प्यार से बडो कोई रोग हतना,,
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

न चहिए प्यार मोकू बारिश की बूंद को,,
छाती से लगाके देजा मौकु सकून सो,,

हा खून सो जलावे गोरी तेरा हंसना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जाएंगे सजना,,

Ho kese aau milve bajenge kangna,,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna 

Aave to aaja jhuti baat Kyo banave,,
Do mahina se rani yeth kyo dikhave,,
Ha baat banave bethi bethi angana,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna

Ha karle savar babu milne bhi aaungi ,,
Pyar ki hai pyas pani hath se pilaungi,,,
Pyar se bdo koi rog hath na,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna,,

N chahiye pyar moku barish ki bund ko,,
Chhati se lagake deja moku sakun so,,

khoon  so jalave gori tera hasna,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna,,,

snippet.title: Sanam Teri Kasam - 8K/4K Music Video | Harshvardhan Rane | Himesh Reshammiya | Ankit Tiwari, Palak M
snippet.description:
Relive the timeless romance with the stunning 8K/4K music video of "Sanam Teri Kasam" from the movie Sanam Teri Kasam. Featuring the heartfelt chemistry of Harshvardhan Rane and Mawra Hocane, this soulful track is beautifully composed by Himesh Reshammiya and sung by Ankit Tiwari and Palak Muchhal.

#sanamterikasam #8k #8kvideo #harshvardhanrane #mawrahocane #ankittiwari #palakmuchhal #himeshreshammiya 

Description:
Song - Sanam Teri Kasam
Singer - Ankit Tiwari, Palak Muchhal
Composer - Himesh Reshammiya
Lyricist - Himesh Reshammiya, Sameer Anjaan

Lyrics:
Betahasha dil ne
Tujhko hi chaaha hai
Har duaa mein maine
Tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aankhen ho jaati namm
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Huaa ye kya hashar mera
Judaa huaa sabar mera
Main tere bin ek lamha
Kyun kabhi naa jiya

Raat bhar ashqo ne tujhko pukara hai
Har dua main maine tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aankhen ho jaati nam
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam...

Nasha tera dil ko lagaa
Dena nahi mujhko dagaa
Main teri aadat ka maara
Hai kya meri khataa

Tere bin naamumkin
Apna guzaara hai
Har duaa mein maine
Tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aakhen ho jaati nam
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

snippet.description:
Banjaare - Bairan
Stream/Download ~

~ Music INFO ~
Title: Bairan
Singer/Lyricist/Composer: BANJAARE
Music: Roni
Mix-Master: Gurie
Animation : Ham_mah.10

https://www.instagram.com/official_banjaare?igsh=eWd5MGIwbXpscThk&utm_source=qr

Lyrics ~ Banjaare - Bairan
Manne saambh-saambh raakhe
Tere jhanjhraa ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi
Chhori bawle se hore

Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere
Khaaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen konya deti
Haaye...
Bairi tanhaai manne

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Ho...
Maarya-maarya phire
Dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi
Ke jeena banjaare ka

Khoya rahun yaad teri
Kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batuwe mein rakhun teri
Saambh ke nishaaniyaan

Tere bina kaal horeya
Theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram dede
Saansa te rihaai manne

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai re
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai re

Je tu thodi ghabra jya
Meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re main
Aa jaaunga

Todun duniya ki reet
Re ke haar re ke jeet
Manne chahiye teri preet
Main nibha jaaunga

Dekh bawla bana gi
Manne likhna sikha gi
Haaye... noch-noch khaagi
Teri bairan judaai manne

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai re
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai re

Aaj taai nibhaun jo si
Kasam thi khaai manne
Zindagi saari ya meri
Tere lekhe laai manne

snippet.title: Ishqa'n De Lekhe (Official Teaser) | Gurnam Bhullar| Isha Malviya | New Punjabi Movie 2026
snippet.description:
Ishqa'n De Lekhe (Official Trailer) | Gurnam Bhullar | Isha Malviya | New Punjabi Movie 2026
 

 Get ready to fall in love all over again! Speed Records presents the trailer for the most-awaited Punjabi love story of
2026- "Ishga'n De Lekhe"
Starring the sensational Gurnam Bhullar alongside the stunning Isha Malviya, this Punjabi cinema is crafted for every soul that has ever loved deeply. Directed by the talented Manvir Brar, Ishqa'n De Lekhe is set to redefine Punjabi romance on the big screen.
After delivering back-to-back blockbusters with Lekh and Surkhi Bhindi, Gurnam Bullar returns with yet another masterpiece - and this one is nothing short of magical. This new Punjabi movie is the story that speaks the language of love & is destined to become an evergreen classic of Punjabi cinema.
Mark your calendars. Book your seats. Releasing in cinemas on 6th March 2026
#IshqanDeLekhe #GurnamBhullar #IshaMalviya
#PunjabiMovies #PunjabiMovieTrailer #NewPunjabiMovie
#SpeedRecords #PuniabiMovie2026
   
  Male Lead : Gurnam Bhullar
Female Lead : Isha Malviya
Directed by: Manvir Brar
Story/Screenplay/Dialogue: Jassi Lohka
Produced By: Gurnam Bhullar
Executive Producer: Jaswinder Lahri
Music on: Speed Records
Star Cast: Rana Ranbir, Mintu Kappa, Balwinder Bullet, Gurleen Chopra, Gurpreet Randhawa, Jasbir Gill,Mohni Toor, Babar Khan, Kavi Singh, Shanaya Khanna, Maninder velly, Arshdeep Kaur Bhatti, Davvy Singh, Sirat Preet, Rang Harjinder, Pushpak Chaunta, Hezal Sapra, Arshdeep Singh Gill
Dop: Harpreet

snippet.title: BOMB LAGELU | #Neelkamal_Singh | ( बम लागेलु ) | #नीलकमल सिंह | #Akansha_Puri | LATEST BHOJPURI SONG
snippet.description:
Presenting the energetic Bhojpuri Song “Bomb Lagelu” sung by the hit machine Neelkamal Singh. This song features the stunning Akanksha Puri along with Neelkamal Singh. With powerful music by Vinay Vinayak and catchy lyrics written by Ashutosh Tiwari, this track is full of Bhojpuri swag, romance and desi vibes.

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood#hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: Pramod Premi New Song | Kamar Dukhave Mei | Khushi Yadav | New Bhojpuri Song | New Bhojpuri Gana
snippet.description:
“कमर दुखावे में ” एक नया धमाकेदार भोजपुरी गीत है, जिसमें प्रमोद प्रेमी यादव की शानदार आवाज सुनने को मिलती है और इसमें खुशी यादव की शानदार प्रस्तुति देखने को मिलती है। इस गाने में देसी अंदाज, मजेदार बोल और जबरदस्त म्यूजिक का बेहतरीन मेल है, जो भोजपुरी संगीत प्रेमियों को खूब पसंद आएगा। 🎶🔥

Subscribe to our channel for more Bhojpuri Songs:
https://youtube.com/c/SaregamaHumBhojpuri

Song Name : Kamar Dukhave Mei (कमर दुखावे में )
Singer : Pramod Premi Yadav
Music : Rahul Yadav
Lyrics : Ravi Yadav
Ft - Khushi Yadav
Director - Pawan pathak 
Choreographer - Aslam Khan & Naveen Thakur 
DOP  - Rinku
Editor  - Rishu 
Di - Sandeep Bajpai
Makeup - Rajesh

snippet.title: Aspirants Season 3 - Official Trailer | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Aspirants Season 3 Official Trailer 
Starring Naveen Kasturia, Sunny Hinduja, Jatin Goswami, Abhilash Thapliyal, Shivankit Singh Parihar, Namita Dubey, Tengam Celine
Directed by Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish
The Viral Fever Production

Official Release Date - March 13, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Inquiry begins on DM Abhilash after ALC Sandeep Ohlan’s allegations putting his personal relationship with Deepa, Guri, Dhairya, SK & Sandeep at stake and disrupting his professional goals against a new rival. While the young Abhilash, after having qualified for IRS, decides to attempt for IAS one final time preparing from Mukherjee Nagar among some new friends & foes.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.title: Chaitra Mangala Osha Katha | ଚୈତ୍ର ମଙ୍ଗଳା ଓଷା କଥା | Namita Agrawal
snippet.description:
ଓଡ଼ିଆ ପରମ୍ପରାରେ ଚୈତ୍ର ମଙ୍ଗଳବାରର ମହତ୍ତ୍ୱ ଅତି ଅନନ୍ୟ। ପରିବାରର ମଙ୍ଗଳ ଏବଂ ସମସ୍ତ ବିପଦରୁ ରକ୍ଷା ପାଇବା ପାଇଁ ମା' ମଙ୍ଗଳାଙ୍କୁ ସ୍ମରଣ କରି କରାଯାଉଥିବା "ଚୈତ୍ର ମଙ୍ଗଳା ଓଷା କଥା" ଶୁଣନ୍ତୁ ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ପ୍ରିୟ କଣ୍ଠଶିଳ୍ପୀ ନମିତା ଅଗ୍ରୱାଲଙ୍କ ସୁମଧୁର ସ୍ୱରରେ। ମା'ଙ୍କର ଏହି କଥା ଶ୍ରବଣ କଲେ ମନର ସବୁ ଅଭିଳାଷ ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ହୁଏ ବୋଲି ବିଶ୍ୱାସ ରହିଛି।

#ChaitraMangalaOsha #NamitaAgrawal #sidharthmusic #OdiaOshaKatha #MaaMangala #OdiaDevotional #TraditionalOdisha #ChaitraMangalabar #OshaBrata

snippet.description:
होली के सात दिन बाद  शीतला सप्तमी मनाई जाती है, इस दिन माता शीतला की उपासना की जाती है | शीतला सप्तमी एवं अष्टमी को बसौड़ा के नाम से भी जाना जाता है | हिंदू पंचांग के अनुसार, चैत्र माह के कृष्ण पक्ष की सप्तमी तिथि को शीतला सप्तमी मनाई जाती है | माता शीतला को सभी मनोकामनाओं की पूर्ति करने वाली देवी के रूप में पूजा जाता है | मां शीतला को ठंडक प्रदान करने वाली देवी कहा गया है | इनकी उपासना से आरोग्य का वरदान भी प्राप्त होता है | शीतल स्वभाव होने के कारण माता को एक दिवस पूर्व बनाए ठंडे भोजन का भोग लगाया जाता है एवं उसी को बाद में प्रसाद के रूप में ग्रहण किया जाता है | इस दिन घर के सभी सदस्य ठंडा भोजन करते हैं | इस दिन रसोई में भोजन नहीं पकाया जाता है तो आइए शीतला माता को समर्पित अनुराधा पौडवाल द्वारा स्वरबद्ध अनुपम भजन का आनंद लें | 
Subscribe: http://www.youtube.com/tseriesbhakti
🙏https://youtu.be/7PR4IUjckME🙏 

Jai Maa Sheetla 
Singer: Anuradha Paudwal 
Music Director: Pt. Pradeep Sen
Lyricist: R.S. Nainvi
Music Label: T-Series

shitla mata ki kahani, shitla mata bhajan, shitla mata song, shitla mata ki pooja, shitla mata ki puja, shitla mata ki pooja vidhi, shitla mata ki puja vidhi, shitla mata ki aarti, shitma mata ki katha in hindi, shitla mata ni varta, shitla mata mantra, shitla mata chalisa, sheetla mata ki kahani, sheetla mata bhajan, sheetla mata song, sheetla mata ki pooja, sheetla mata ki puja, sheetla mata ki pooja vidhi, sheetla mata ki puja vidhi, sheetla mata ki aarti, shitma mata ki katha in hindi, sheetla mata ni varta, sheetla mata mantra, sheetla mata chalisa, anuradha paudwal sheetma mata ke bhajan, sheetla mata ke bhajan anuradha paudwal, shitla mata ke bhajan anuradha paudwal, shitla saptami, shitla ashtami, basoda saptami, basoda ashtami, बसौड़ा सप्तमी, बसौड़ा अष्टमी

#TSeriesBhaktiSagar #anuradhapaudwal #शीतला_सप्तमी #शीतलाअष्टमी #शीतलामाता #sheetlasaptami #shitlamatamandir #navratrisong #navratribhajan  #shitla_maiya_ke_languriya

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

pt.title: Minecraft Speedrunnes VS 6 Caçadores
pt.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 caçadores. Vocêes pediram. A continuação da série. Isso foi absolutamente insano.

Siga minhas redes sociais:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo:  @thesaintsofgames
George:  @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:  @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
awesamdude:  @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy

Nós decidimos chamar essa série de Minecraft Manhunt. Esse vídeo é uma rendição diferente dele, onde tem SEIS caçadores ao invés de TRÊS ou de apenas um.

Esse é um novo desafio 'Minecraft, mas...' na 1.21.11 que nós decidimos testar. Eu tento zerar o jogo, enquanto meus amigos George E meu amigo Sapnap, E meu amigo Badboyhalo, E meu amigo Antfrost, E meu amigo Awesamdude E minha amiga CaptainPuffy tentam me impedir. É uma corrida, e é super intenso e nós rimos bastante. Eu amo fazer esses desafios.

Se esse vídeo chegar a 500 mil curtidas nós vamos fazer um vídeo de revanche!

Não é 'Minecraft, mas a água sobe' ou 'Minecraft, mas a lava sobe', ou algum outro desafio desse tipo. Essa é uma speedrun, com um speedrunner no minecraft contra um caçador/assassino.

#MinecraftManhunt

tr.title: Minecraft Manhunt VS 6 Avcı
tr.description:
Minecraft Manhunt VS 6 Avcı. Siz istediniz, işte serinin devamı. Bu kesinlikle çılgıncaydı.

Sosyal medya hesaplarımı takip edin:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Ürünler: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames
George: @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap: @Sapnap
Antfrost: @Antfrost
awesamdude: @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy

Bu seriye Minecraft Manhunt adını verdik. Bu video, üç avcı veya sadece bir avcı yerine altı avcının olduğu farklı bir versiyonu.

Bu, denemeye karar verdiğimiz yeni bir Minecraft 1.21.11 challenge’ı. Ben oyunu bitirmeye çalışırken, arkadaşım George, arkadaşım Sapnap, arkadaşım BadBoyHalo, arkadaşım Antfrost, arkadaşım awesamdude ve arkadaşım CaptainPuffy beni durdurmaya çalışıyor. Bu bir yarış ve çok heyecanlıydı, çok güldük. Bu tür challenge’ları yapmayı çok seviyorum.

Bu video 500.000 beğeni alırsa, rövanş yapacağız!

మేము ఈ సిరీస్‌ను Minecraft Manhunt అని పిలవాలని నిర్ణయించుకున్నాము. ఈ వీడియో దాని యొక్క భిన్నమైన వెర్షన్, ఇక్కడ ముగ్గురు వేటగాళ్ళు లేదా ఒకరు మాత్రమే కాకుండా ఆరుగురు వేటగాళ్ళు ఉన్నారు.

ఇది కొత్త Minecraft కానీ, 1.21.11 సవాలును మేము ప్రయత్నించాలని నిర్ణయించుకున్నాము. నేను ఆటలో గెలవడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తాను, నా స్నేహితుడు జార్జ్ మరియు నా స్నేహితుడు సప్నాప్ మరియు నా స్నేహితుడు బాడ్‌బాయ్‌హాలో మరియు నా స్నేహితుడు ఆంట్‌ఫ్రాస్ట్ మరియు నా స్నేహితుడు అద్భుతం మరియు నా స్నేహితుడు కెప్టెన్‌పఫీ నన్ను అలా చేయకుండా నిరోధించడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తారు. ఇది ఒక రేసు, మరియు ఇది చాలా తీవ్రంగా ఉంటుంది మరియు మేము చాలా నవ్వుకున్నాము. ఈ సవాళ్లను చేయడం నాకు చాలా ఇష్టం.

ఈ వీడియోకు 500,000 లైక్‌లు వస్తే, మనం తిరిగి మ్యాచ్ చేస్తాము!

మైన్‌క్రాఫ్ట్ కాదు, కానీ వాటర్ రైజెస్ లేదా మైన్‌క్రాఫ్ట్, కానీ లావా రైజెస్, లేదా మరేదైనా కానీ అలాంటి సవాలు. ఇది కిల్లర్ / హంతకుడిపై మైన్‌క్రాఫ్ట్ యొక్క స్పీడ్ రన్ / స్పీడ్ రన్నర్.

bn.description:
মাইনক্রাফ্ট  স্পিডরানার ভার্সেস ৬ জন হান্টার। তোমরা এটা চেয়েছিলে। সিরিজের পুনরজীবন। একটা অত্যন্ত চমৎকার ছিল।

আমার সোশ্যালগুলি ফলো করো:
➽ টুইটার - @unknown-role

ক্যাপ্টেন পাফি:  @CaptainPuffy

আমরা এই সিরিজকে মাইনক্রাফ্ট ম্যানহান্ট বলার সিদ্ধান্ত নিয়েছি । এই  ভিডিওটি কারি আরেক রূপ, যেখানে ৬ জন হান্টার আছে চীন অথবা একজনের বদলে।
এটি একটি নতুন Minecraft 1.21.11 চ্যালেঞ্জ যা আমরা চেষ্টা করার সিদ্ধান্ত নিয়েছি। আমি গেমটি জেতার চেষ্টা করি, আর আমার বন্ধু জর্জ, স্যাপন্যাপ, ব্যাডবয়হেলো, অ্যান্টফ্রস্ট, অসমডুড এবং ক্যাপ্টেন পাফি আমাকে বাধা দেওয়ার চেষ্টা করে। এটি মূলত একটি দৌড় প্রতিযোগিতা, এটি অত্যন্ত উত্তেজনাপূর্ণ ছিল এবং আমরা প্রচুর মজা করেছি। আমি এই ধরনের চ্যালেঞ্জগুলো করতে খুব পছন্দ করি।
যদি এই ভিডিওতে ৫০০,০০০ লাইক পড়ে, তবে আমরা আবার এর একটি ফিরতি ম্যাচ  খেলব!
এটি "মাইনক্রাফট, কিন্তু জল বাড়ছে" বা "মাইনক্রাফট, কিন্তু লাভা বাড়ছে"—এই ধরণের কোনো চ্যালেঞ্জ নয়। এটি একজন খুনি বা আততায়ীর বিরুদ্ধে মাইনক্রাফটের একজন স্পিডরানার-এর টিকে থাকার লড়াই।

இந்தத் தொடரை Minecraft Manhunt என்று அழைக்க முடிவு செய்தோம். இந்த வீடியோ அதன் வித்தியாசமான பதிப்பாகும், அங்கு மூன்று வேட்டைக்காரர்களுக்குப் பதிலாக ஆறு வேட்டைக்காரர்கள் அல்லது ஒருவர் மட்டுமே உள்ளனர்.

இது ஒரு புதிய Minecraft ஆனால், 1.21.11 சவாலை நாங்கள் முயற்சிக்க முடிவு செய்துள்ளோம். நான் விளையாட்டை வெல்ல முயற்சிக்கிறேன், அதே நேரத்தில் என் நண்பர் ஜார்ஜ் மற்றும் என் நண்பர் சப்னாப் மற்றும் என் நண்பர் பேட்பாய்ஹாலோ மற்றும் என் நண்பர் ஆண்ட்ஃப்ரோஸ்ட் மற்றும் என் நண்பர் அவெசம்டுட் மற்றும் என் நண்பர் கேப்டன் பஃபி நான் அதைச் செய்வதைத் தடுக்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்கள். இது ஒரு பந்தயம், இது மிகவும் தீவிரமானது, எங்களுக்கு நிறைய சிரிப்புகள் இருந்தன. இந்த சவால்களைச் செய்வது எனக்கு மிகவும் பிடிக்கும்.

இந்த வீடியோ 500,000 லைக்குகளைப் பெற்றால், நாங்கள் மீண்டும் ஒரு போட்டியை நடத்துவோம்!

மைன்கிராஃப்ட் அல்ல, ஆனால் வாட்டர் ரைசஸ் அல்லது மைன்கிராஃப்ட், ஆனால் லாவா ரைசஸ், அல்லது வேறு ஏதேனும் ஆனால் அது போன்ற சவால். இது ஒரு கொலையாளி / கொலையாளிக்கு எதிரான மைன்கிராஃப்டின் வேக ஓட்டம் / வேக ஓட்டப்பந்தய வீரர்.

Mai hi scene mai hi game
Mere khoon me hai jeet dekh pass aake pain
Kalakar ka hai brain
Double R ki hai crane
Audemars ka hai time Bulgari ki chain
Insan insane
Mera kaam insane

mera pen mera pain meri bandi cocaine
mere gaane propane

snippet.title: ROAST | Team India ke ye khilaadi nikle World Cup ke asli heroes | IND vs NZ | Cricket
snippet.description:
#TeamIndia #T20WorldCup2026 #INDvsNZ #WorldCupHeroes #IndianCricket #CricketRoast #CricketAnalysis #TeamIndiaChampion #CricketFans #WorldCupFinal #CricketTalk #CricketComedy

Team India’s historic triumph in the T20 World Cup 2026 Final against New Zealand was not just about one star — it was a complete team effort. In this ROAST episode, we reveal the real heroes of India’s World Cup campaign who stepped up when it mattered the most.
From clutch batting performances under pressure to game-changing bowling spells and smart captaincy decisions, several Indian players played crucial roles throughout the tournament. But which players truly carried Team India to the trophy? Who delivered consistently from group stage to the final? And which unexpected performers became the silent match-winners?
This episode breaks down the biggest performances of the tournament with sharp analysis, fan reactions, memes, and entertaining roasting. We look beyond headlines to celebrate the players whose contributions defined India’s World Cup victory.
If you enjoy cricket discussions mixed with humor, debates, and honest opinions, this video is for you.

T20 वर्ल्ड कप 2026 में टीम इंडिया की जीत सिर्फ एक खिलाड़ी की नहीं बल्कि पूरे टीम प्रयास की कहानी रही। इस खास ROAST एपिसोड में हम बात करेंगे उन खिलाड़ियों की जो इस वर्ल्ड कप के असली हीरो बनकर सामने आए।
दबाव में शानदार बल्लेबाजी, मैच पलट देने वाली गेंदबाजी और सही समय पर लिए गए कप्तानी फैसलों ने भारत को चैंपियन बनाया। लेकिन आखिर कौन थे वो खिलाड़ी जिन्होंने पूरे टूर्नामेंट में लगातार टीम को संभाला? किसने फाइनल समेत बड़े मैचों में मैच विनिंग प्रदर्शन दिया?
इस वीडियो में हम पूरे टूर्नामेंट के टॉप परफॉर्मर्स का मजेदार अंदाज़ में विश्लेषण करेंगे — साथ में होंगे फैंस के रिएक्शन, सोशल मीडिया मीम्स और बिना फिल्टर का क्रिकेट रोस्ट।
अगर आपको क्रिकेट एनालिसिस, डिबेट और एंटरटेनिंग रोस्ट पसंद है, तो यह वीडियो आपके लिए है।
वीडियो को लाइक करें, शेयर करें और चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना ना भूलें।
आपके हिसाब से वर्ल्ड कप का असली हीरो कौन था? कमेंट में जरूर बताएं।

Dont worry, we won't judge you for binge-watching the OG content on @zeeswitch 
Subscribe and let's have a great time together!

SWITCH is a leap in the world of content - raw, uncensored and unfiltered. The platform puts together ground reports, explainers, short films, cricket, roast shows, interviews, entertainment, tech and AI and much more with an attitude that’s about millennials and Gen Z.
We believe in the art of sharp and meaningful storytelling with a dollop of wit and satire. 
Time to shift gears, time to change…it is time to SWITCH!
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Tuition Badmashi Kaa - Hemant Faujdar, Kiran Brar, Masoom Sharma, Manisha Sharma,  Aman Jaji, Ajay Dhankhar, Narender Jaji, Zipsi Studio, Saya Films.

Lyrics: Ajay Dhankhar
Music/Composer: Aman Jaji

#tuitionbadmashikaa  #desirecords  #haryanvi  


Black Moon Films Presents Tuition Badmashi Kaa penned by Ajay Dhankhar, performed by Mr. Hemant Faujdar & Miss Kiran Brar, sung by Mr. Masoom Sharma, Miss Manisha Sharma Ji, harmony by Mr. Aman Jaji, lived by Mr. Ajay Dhankhar & Mr. Narender Jaji

Starring: Hemant Faujdar, Kiran Brar
Supporting Actor: Arun Malik, Kiyaan Malik, Madhav Maddy
Singer: Masoom Sharma, Manisha Sharma
Lyrics: Ajay Dhankhar
Music: Aman Jaji
Director: Ajay Dhankhar
Art Director: Vijay Giri
Action Director: Vishal Bhargav
Assistant Director: Vivek Garg, Narender Jaji, Rohit Dhankhar

snippet.title: Jawani (Official Video) | Sabba | Meavin | New Punjabi Song 2026 | Latest Punjabi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Speed Records presents “Jawani”, a high-energy Punjabi pop song sung by Sabba. Jawani is the kind of pop song that instantly lifts the mood and gets everyone on the dance floor.

With its upbeat music and powerful vocals, Jawani by Sabba is a perfect addition to any Punjabi party song playlist. Whether you're looking for a Punjabi pop song to groove to, a dance song for parties, or the latest Punjabi song to vibe with friends, this new song delivers the perfect mix of music and energy.

Fans of “32 Dand” and “Fly Karke” by Sabba will definitely enjoy this Sabba song too, as it carries the same energetic vibe and catchy Punjabi pop style that makes Sabba’s music perfect for Punjabi song playlists. If you enjoy Punjabi pop songs, Punjabi party songs, and trending Punjabi dance music, Jawani is a must-listen. Turn up the volume and let the electrifying beats bring the ultimate party atmosphere.

Stay tuned for more Punjabi songs, Punjabi pop hits, and the latest music from Speed Records.

#Jawani #Sabba #PunjabiSong #PunjabiNewSong #PunjabiGane #PunjabiPartySongs #SabbaNewSong #SabbaSong #PartySong

Fans of “32 Dand” and “Fly Karke” by Sabba will definitely enjoy this Sabba song too, as it carries the same energetic vibe and catchy Punjabi pop style that makes Sabba’s music perfect for Punjabi song playlists. If you enjoy Punjabi pop songs, Punjabi party songs, and trending Punjabi dance music, Jawani is a must-listen. Turn up the volume and let the electrifying beats bring the ultimate party atmosphere.

Stay tuned for more Punjabi songs, Punjabi pop hits, and the latest music from Speed Records.

snippet.title: Easily 3 Star Dragon Escape Challenges 5-8 (Clash of Clans)
snippet.description:
How to 3 Star Levels 5 to 8 of the Hero Campaign: Dragon Escape Challenges in Clash of Clans. Judo Sloth provides a tutorial for the new event attacks which celebrate the launch of the Dragon Duke Hero. The March Season is Dragon Themed for the Dragon Duke and comes with numerous events, including Free Equipment or Starry Ore on the Supercell Store. Thank you for using code judo to support the channel. Best of luck with your 3 stars!

Free Equipment or Starry Ore on Supercell Store: https://store.supercell.com/en?boost=judo

snippet.title: तीन बाण के धारी | छोटू सिंह रावना | Khatu shyam New bhajan | Teen baan ke Dhari | Chotu Singh Rawna
snippet.description:
तीन बाण के धारी | छोटू सिंह रावना | Khatu shyam New bhajan | Teen baan ke Dhari | Chotu Singh Rawna

तीन बाण के धारी बाबा श्याम की महिमा को समर्पित यह नवीन भजन,
छोटू सिंह रावना की मधुर आवाज़ में।
खाटू नरेश श्री श्याम बाबा, जो तीन बाण धारण करने वाले कलयुग के देवता हैं,
अपने भक्तों की हर पुकार सुनते हैं और कष्ट हर लेते हैं।
यह भजन श्रद्धा, भक्ति और आस्था से भरपूर है।
🙏 बाबा श्याम से प्रार्थना है कि यह भजन आप सभी के जीवन में सुख, शांति और कृपा लेकर आए।

अगर भजन पसंद आए तो

snippet.title: REBUILDING an OLD BUGGATI VEYRON to FASTEST CAR EVER! 🔥 Forza Horizon 5 | LOGITECH G29
snippet.description:
REBUILDING an OLD BUGGATI VEYRON to FASTEST CAR EVER! 🔥 Forza Horizon 5 | LOGITECH G29
DRIVING FASTEST JAPANESE CAR 😱 {697+ KMPH} Forza Horizon 5 | LOGITECH G29
THIS CAR IS MORE FASTER THEN JESKO! 😱 {697+ KMPH} Forza Horizon 5 | LOGITECH G29 

REBUILDING an OLD LAMBORGHINI to FASTEST LAMBO EVER! 🔥 - Forza Horizon 5 | LOGITECH G29

What happens when you take a forgotten, beat-up Lamborghini and transform it into an absolute speed monster? In this Forza Horizon 5 build, we're doing the IMPOSSIBLE! 🚀

Watch as we take a neglected Lamborghini from the junkyard, completely rebuild it, tune every component, and push it beyond its limits to create what might just be the FASTEST Lamborghini ever built in Forza Horizon 5! All played with the Logitech G29 steering wheel for the ultimate sim racing experience


Subscribe to our Other Youtube Channels

Second Gaming Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@Dattraxplays

snippet.title: बुधवार स्पेशल | गणेश जी के भजन 2026 | Ganesh Bhajan 2026 | Ganesh Ji Ke Bhajan | Ganesh Songs
snippet.description:
बुधवार स्पेशल | गणेश जी के भजन 2026 | Ganesh Bhajan 2026 | Ganesh Ji Ke Bhajan | Ganesh Songs

तो आईए आज पावन हृदय से इस भजन द्वारा जो मांगना है मांग लीजिए।
श्याम बाबा सबकी मनोकामनांए पूर्ण करें। 🙏

गणेश जी के रोज नए नए भजन सुनने के लिए हमारे साथ जुड़ें रहे व् नए नए भजनों का आनंद उठाये भजन पसंद आये तो कमेंट में '' जय श्री गणेश " जरुर लिखें || Jai Shree Shyam 🌹🌹

⭐Song :  
गजानंद तुम्हे पहले मनाएं
मेरे लाडले गणेश प्यारे प्यारे
आओ आओ गजानन आओ
लड्डुवन का भोग हूँ लाई 
देवा मेरे घर तू आजा
गजानन कर दो बेड़ा पार
सुनलो विनती दयानिधान
श्री गणेश जी के 108 नाम
गणपति गणेश को मेरा प्रणाम 
सुखकर्ता दुःखहर्ता आरती
⭐Singer : Sanchit + Upasana mehta 
⭐Lyrics : Traditional
⭐Music: Binny Narang (9991980610)
⭐Video: Shalini Sharma (7015960610)
⭐Label Bhakti Sadhna (9466651081)
⭐Category: Hindi Devotional (Shyam Bhajan)
भक्ति साधना कंपनी से भजन बनवाने के लिए और भजन रिलीज़ करवाने के लिए संपर्क करे 9466651081
                     


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                                      🎧 Listen On Streaming Sites

🎵Gaana        https://gaana.com/artist/upasana-mehta
🎵JioSaawan https://www.jiosaavn.com/artist/upasana-mehta/MiW60hV8raw_

🎵Wynk          https://wynk.in/music/artist/upasana-mehta/upasana-mehta

From racing through bustling markets to mastering daring heists, follow along as we drive, customize, and conquer all challenges! Don't forget to hit the subscribe button for more incredible gameplay adventures. 🔔 #IndianThiftAuto #Gameplay #Cars #Bikes #GamingVibes

Watch as we take on thrilling challenges, showcase stunning visuals, and uncover hidden treasures throughout the city. From gripping action sequences to hilarious moments, this gameplay promises fun for every viewer. Don't forget to hit that LIKE button and SUBSCRIBE for more epic content! 🛵✨ Comment below and share your thoughts or tips, and let’s cruise into adventure together! #IndianThiftAutoSimulator #GamingJoy

In this electrifying new gameplay, we showcase the heart-pounding moments of crafting epic car and bike adventures in a uniquely vibrant Indian setting. Watch as we navigate through crowded streets and experience the thrill of unexpected twists! 😎 Whether you're a seasoned pro or a newcomer, our gameplay offers valuable tips and jaw-dropping maneuvers that will keep you entertained. Buckle up and prepare for high-speed action, hilarious encounters, and ultimate thrills! Don’t forget to like, comment, and subscribe for more Indian Thift Auto Simulator gameplay! 🚗💨

Whether you’re a booster of open-world games or just curious about what India has to offer in the gaming world, this video is a must-watch. Don’t forget to like, subscribe, and hit that bell icon for more epic gameplay updates! 🎮🔥 #IndianThiftAuto #Gameplay

snippet.title: LAARE : Maninder Buttar | Sargun Mehta | B Praak | Arvindr Khaira | Punjabi Song| Lyrical
snippet.description:
Enjoy the official video of Punjabi song LAARE (ਲਾਰੀ) by Maninder Buttar featuring Sargun Mehta music & composition by B Praak also lyrics penned by Jaani video directed by Arvindr Khaira and produced by Gunbir Singh Sidhu & Manmord Sidhu. Click here to Subscribe Ishtar Punjabi channel for Punjabi songs : http://bit.ly/SubscribeWhiteHillMusic

Song Credits :

Song : Laare
Singer : Maninder Buttar
Featuring : Sargun Mehta
Music & Composer : B Praak
Lyrics : Jaani
Video by : Arvindr Khaira
Editor : Adele Pereira
Mix and master: Gurjinder Guri & Akaash Bambar
Colorist : Pranav Manna
Guitars : Shomu Seal
Shehnai- Rajendra G Salunke
Supporting cast: Jaskaran Saini & Simran Sharma
Creative Director / Steadicam Operator :- Amaninder Singh
Dop :- Sayed Tanveer
Choreographer: Sahaj Singh, Shreoshi
Assistant Director :- Satnam , Sukhman sukhu, Sonia
Make up :- Rajan Pasai
Hair By : Rashid
Production :-  Neeraj Bhatt
Produced by : Gunbir Singh Sidhu & Manmord Sidhu
Online Promotions : Pixilar Studios

Lyrics : 

Main sab kuj chad dita tere karke
Tere uton sab kuj vaari baithi aan
Tainu pta taan hai par fikar nai
Tere layi main yaara ve kawaari baithi aan
Yaari teri ve yaari
Jisaman tak aa sari di sari yaari
Yaari teri ve yaari
Jisaman tak aa sari di sari
Ve dhakka hona mere naal
Mainu pta bas Laare aa
Ve tu viah nai karona mere naal
Mainu pta bas Laare aa
Ve tu viah nai karona mere naal
Mainu pta bas Laare aa
Ve tu viah nai karona mere naal
Yaari teri ve yaari
Jisaman tak aa sari di sari yaari
Yaari teri ve yaari
Jisaman tak aa sari di sari
Akhiyan ch surma main pauna chadhta
Jaggde hi rahiye haye sona chadhta
Akhiyan ch surma main pauna chadhta
Jaggde hi rahiye haye sona chadhta
Tere piche chadhte main gharde mere
Tere piche hassna hasona chadhta
Kyun rauley pauna mere naal
Mainu pta bas Laare aa
Ve tu viah nai karona mere naal
Mainu pta bas Laare aa
Ve tu viah nai karona mere naal
Na kise joga chadhe aitbaar na kareyo
Kade kise shayar nu pyar na kareyo
Shayiri vaayiri sun dil vaar na kareyo
Kise joga chadhe aitbaar na kareyo
Jaani naal laayian te pta laggeya 
Kade kise Shayar naal pyaar naa kareyo
Mera hoyea bura haal
Mainu pta bas Laare aa
Ve tu viah nai karona mere naal
Mainu pta bas Laare aa
Ve tu viah nai karona mere naal

snippet.title: Siampuii Ralte - Mizo takin
snippet.description:
He hla ‘Mizo takin’ hi Pu Dawngkima (L) chhungten phal tak maia min sak tir avangin ka lawm hle mai.
Min ngaihthlaksak ṭheuh turin ka sawm che a che u. Tin, he hla hian nasa lehzual zawka Zoram mipuite ruihhlo dona kawnga theihtawp chhuah thar lehzual tura min fuih thartu lo ni mawlh rawh se.

snippet.title: HACKER OR WHAT | JONATHAN IS BACK!! | BGMI!
snippet.description:
Hey Guys, I’m Jonathan Amaral, better known as Jonathan Gaming, a professional BGMI esports athlete and streamer.

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, I’ve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community. 

Through years of dedication, I’ve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

Redbull Athlete 🧢
BGIS 2025 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2025 Finals MVP 👑
BMPS 2024 2nd Runner up 🥉
BGMS 2022 MVP 🏆
BGMS 2022 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2021 Overall Top Fragger 🎯
PMWL #2 Overall Fragger 💣
PMCO Globals #4 Fragger 💣
PMPL 2020 Finals #2 Fragger 🎯
PMPL 2020 Finals Runner up 🥈
PMIS 2020 Top Fragger 🎯
PMIS 2020 India Champions 🏆
PMCO 2019 Fall Split SA Champion 🏆


 Follow Me & Stay Connected! 
📷 Instagram - @ig_jonathangaming
💬 Discord - https://discord.gg/jonathan
📺 YouTube - https://www.youtube.com/@JONATHANGAMINGYT/
🐦 Twitter - @ig_jonathan16

🎮 Join the #JonathanArmy & Be Part of the Esports Revolution! 🎮
💖 Like, Share & Subscribe for More Epic Content! 💖

#JONATHANISLIVE #JONATHANBGMI #JONATHANGAMING #ESPORTS #BGMIINDIA #GAMING #LIVESTREAM

Macha ava en favourite-u

Light-a siricha bright-a aachu 
Ini life-u fulla gujaal dhaan

ushar panna use-u pannuven

snippet.title: Pandoy is live! wednesday tongits Happy watching 🌟
snippet.description:
Welcome sa LIVE ng Laro ni Pandoy! 🃏🔥
Kung nandito ka ngayon, maraming salamat sa pagbisita at pakikisama sa aming live! Dito sa channel na ito, hindi lang laro ang mapapanood mo — may kulitan, tawanan, diskarte, at solid na bonding kasama ang mga viewers na parang pamilya na rin.

Sa bawat laban ng Tongits, may panalo, may talo, pero ang pinaka-importante ay masaya tayong lahat habang naglalaro. Kaya kung gusto mo ng good vibes, chill na kwentuhan, at exciting na laro, tamang tama ka sa lugar na ito!

Sa mga solid viewers na laging nandiyan, maraming maraming salamat sa inyong suporta. Dahil sa inyo, tuloy-tuloy ang saya ng Laro ni Pandoy. At sa mga bago pa lang dito, welcome na welcome kayo — sana maging parte na rin kayo ng masayang community natin.

Habang live tayo:
👍 Mag LIKE kung nag-eenjoy ka sa laro
💬 Mag COMMENT sa chat para makisali sa kulitan
🔔 Mag SUBSCRIBE para hindi ka ma-miss sa susunod pang live

Tandaan:
Panalo man o talo sa Tongits, ang tunay na panalo ay ang saya nating lahat! 🔥🃏
